# Cursor Rules Generator

Cursor Rules Generator is a free developer tool for generating Cursor Project Rules (.mdc), AGENTS.md, and legacy .cursorrules files.

## Primary pages

- Generator: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/
- Templates: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates
- Cursor Rules guide: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/cursor-rules
- Project Rules guide: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/cursor-project-rules
- AGENTS.md generator: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/agents-md-generator
- .cursorrules generator: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/cursorrules-generator
- Migration guide: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/guides/migrate-cursorrules-to-cursor-rules

## Popular template pages

- Next.js: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates/nextjs
- React: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates/react
- TypeScript: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates/typescript
- Python: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates/python
- Go: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates/go
- Docker: https://www.cursorgenerator.dev/templates/docker
